title: Eyes Everywhere
content: You step out into the fading afternoon light. The air feels thinner here, away from the suffocating luxury of the tower. Your phone pings—a new message from an unknown number.||It's a photo. Taken from across the street. It shows you leaning against your office desk, taken through the window exactly twenty minutes ago.||There is no text, but the message is clear: They are watching. Every move you make, every secret you keep, they are already there.||📝 FILES UPDATED: Surveillance alert logged.
